headline: Is It Too Late To Consider EMCOR Group (EME) After Its Strong 1 Year Share Price Run?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether EMCOR Group at around US$924 per share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price. The stock shows returns of 3.6% over the last 7 days, 23.1% over 30 days, 44.7% year to date and 110.3% over 1 year, with a very large 5 year return that may have changed how investors think about its risk and reward trade off. Recent attention on EMCOR Group has focused on its position in construction and related services, as...
